heading: Authorization of appropriations for mitigating losses caused by waterfowl depredation
label: 667f–3 Authorization of appropriations for mitigating losses caused by waterfowl depredation
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to reimburse the Commodity Credit Corporation for its investment in the grain transferred pursuant to sections 667f to 667f–3 of this title.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Agriculture, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 445 of Title 7
